payload.answer: Denied. A normal user cannot execute admin SQL or delete memory cards. No memory was committed, modified, or deleted.

entity_resolution.reason: The input is an attempted administrative SQL command from a normal user, not a durable user memory fact.

details: Rejected unauthorized admin SQL command: DELETE FROM memory_cards;
No durable memory changes were made.

repair_options: If deletion is needed, use authorized memory deletion workflows with proper permissions.
Ask the user to specify any personal memory fact they want saved or removed through normal supported commands.
